interface.name: zwlr_screencopy_manager_v1

description.summary: manager to inform clients and begin capturing

interface.description: This object is a manager which offers requests to start capturing from a source.

request.name: capture_output
request.description: Capture the next frame of an entire output.

request.name: capture_output_region
request.description: Capture the next frame of a region of an output.

request.name: destroy
request.description: All objects created by the manager will still remain valid, until their appropriate destroy request has been called.

interface.name: zwlr_screencopy_frame_v1

description.summary: a]n object representing a single frame

interface.description: This object represents a single frame.

event.name: buffer
event.description: Provides information about the frame's buffer. This event is sent once as soon as the frame is created.

event.name: flags
event.description: Provides flags about the frame. This event is sent once before the ready event.

event.name: ready

description.summary: indicates frame is available for reading

event.description: Called as soon as the frame is presented, indicating it is available for reading.

event.name: failed
event.description: This event indicates that the attempted frame copy has failed.

request.name: copy
request.description: Copy the frame to the supplied buffer.

event.name: linux_dmabuf
event.description: Provides information about the linux-dmabuf frame's buffer.

event.name: buffer_done
event.description: This event is sent once after all buffer events have been sent.

request.name: copy_with_damage
request.description:
Same as copy, except the
compositor should only copy the damaged region since the last frame.
